headline: Faster dashboards, simpler onboarding — the top two improvements from your feedback.

themes.user_facing_summary: We've optimized your dashboard and workspace interactions. Dashboard load times are now 67% faster, and workspace member listing is snappier for larger teams.
supporting_changes: Reduce dashboard p95 latency from 2.4s to 800ms via DB call batching
Add Redis caching layer to org-settings API
Eliminate N+1 query in workspace member listing endpoint

themes.user_facing_summary: Getting started is now streamlined. Signup is down to 2 steps from 5, and we've added guided tooltips on your first dashboard to help you find what matters.
supporting_changes: Add inline tooltips on first-run dashboard for top 4 metrics
Defer non-essential profile fields to post-signup

notable_changes: Dashboard p95 latency reduced from 2.4s to 800ms — directly addressing your #1 performance complaint
Signup completion improved through streamlined 2-step flow (previously 5 steps)
Workspace member listing is ~30% faster for teams with 50+ members
First-run experience now includes inline guidance for your most-used metrics
API quickstart documentation updated to clarify the new authentication model
customer_voice: Your Q2 feedback highlighted two critical pain points: dashboard performance issues flagged in our NPS survey as the top complaint, and signup friction where we were losing 3 signups per week at step 3. This release addresses both directly.
